channel.title: Phishing on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Phishing on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Phishing new style ;)
item.description:
Got a mail in spam. Read for yourself. It is indeed funny and emotional wording :D . At the bottom, the link it actually points to.

Comments

Comment by Aman…. on 2010-02-01 09:00:20 +0530

Looking at the history of the incidents happening with you, you seem to be getting love from unwanted people a little too much 😉 .

Comment by Sidhu on 2010-02-04 20:27:36 +0530

🙁

Comment by Vaibhav on 2010-02-15 09:36:26 +0530

i feel sorry for the non tech people who would take take that mail seriously
